assumptions: The population is represented by weighted synthetic profile representatives.
Only public-safe aggregates and selected visuals are published.
Scenario transitions follow a simple block-based experimental design.
notable_patterns: Stress peaks during the cognitive and institutional overload block.
Hope drops under compound pressure and only partially recovers.
Baseline drift and residual load remain above the initial level after the 30-day window.
Different cohorts show distinct recovery and accumulation patterns.
